heading: Create the MongoDB Vector Search Index
body:
In this section, you create a MongoDB Vector Search index on the
`sample_mflix.embedded_movies` namespace. The section demonstrates
an index definition that can be used for running various queries. Before
creating the index, complete the procedure to generate the embeddings.

Open [mongosh](mongodb-shell) in a terminal window and connect to your Atlas
cluster. For detailed instructions on connecting, see
[MongoDB Shell](connect-mongo-shell).

> **Example:** **Input:**
>
> ```shell
> use sample_mflix
> ```
>
> **Output:**
>
> ```shell
> switched to db sample_mflix
> ```

```shell
db.embedded_movies.createSearchIndex(
  "multiple-vector-search", 
  "vectorSearch", 
  {
    "fields": [
      {
        "type": "vector",
        "path": "plot_embedding",
        "numDimensions": 1536,
        "similarity": "dotProduct"
      },
      {
        "type": "vector",
        "path": "plot_embedding_voyage_3_large",
        "numDimensions": 2048,
        "similarity": "dotProduct"
      },
      {
        "type": "vector",
        "path": "title_voyageai_embedding",
        "numDimensions": 2048,
        "similarity": "dotProduct"
      }
    ]
  }
);
```

This index definition indexes the following fields:

- `plot_embedding` field as the `vector` [vector](avs-types-vector).
  This field contains [vector embeddings](<vector embeddings>) that represent the summary of a
  movie's plot. The index definition:

  - Specifies `1536` [vectors](vector).

  - Measures [About the Similarity Functions](avs-similarity-functions) using `dotProduct` similarity.

  This field mapping is required for the [Use Cases and Benefits](avs-unionwith-use-cases).

- `plot_embedding_voyage_3_large` field as the `vector` [vector](avs-types-vector).
  This field contains [vector embeddings](<vector embeddings>) that represent the summary of a
  movie's plot. The index definition:

  - Specifies `2048` [vectors](vector).

  - Measures [About the Similarity Functions](avs-similarity-functions) using `dotProduct` similarity.

  This field mapping is required all the queries in this tutorial.

- `title_voyageai_embedding` field as the `vector` [vector](avs-types-vector).
  This field contains [vector embeddings](<vector embeddings>) that represent the
  title of the movie. The index definition:

  - Specifies `2048` [vectors](vector).

  - Measures [About the Similarity Functions](avs-similarity-functions) using `dotProduct` similarity.

  This field mapping is required for the [Use Cases and Benefits](avs-unionwith-use-cases).
